description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a matte black finish and a large, vibrant display showing an anime-style illustration. The keyboard features a full QWERTY layout with additional function keys and a numeric keypad, all marked with white characters for high visibility. The touchpad is centrally located below the keyboard, flanked by palm rests, and the hinge design allows the screen to be propped open at a comfortable viewing angle. The lid of the laptop displays a distinctive 'Red Fox' logo, featuring a stylized red fox and bold text. Several ports are visible along the side, including USB and audio jacks, indicating versatile connectivity. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and entertainment in urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a vibrant anime display, full keyboard, and a distinctive 'Red Fox' logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with anime artwork, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left-side angle highlighting the thin profile, visible ports, and the open screen.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, prominently displaying the 'Red Fox' logo.
description_view_3: Right-side angle showing the keyboard, touchpad, and the open screen from a different perspective.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'Red Fox' logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid, featuring a stylized red fox and the text 'RED FOX' in bold, with the fox integrated into the design.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying colorful anime-style artwork.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row, numeric keypad, and white printed characters, including special keys for multimedia and system functions.
